tasks.name: Create artifacts.rs with decompose_artifacts and all extraction functions
tasks.notes: 1178 lines. 12 tests. Includes pub mod artifacts in lib.rs (needed for test discoverability). Fixed file_cmd_regex consuming && separator.

tasks.name: Wire decompose_artifacts into decompose_record and register module in lib.rs
tasks.notes: Second-pass call added after match block. Also fixed db.rs test hardcoding 2 migration versions (now 3).

deviations.description: file_cmd_regex consumed && separator, preventing subsequent chained commands from matching. Changed regex to non-consuming pattern using character class [;&] instead of alternation group.
db::tests::test_init_db_creates_schema_and_sets_pragmas hardcoded 2 migration versions but migration 003 was added in 05-01. Updated assertion to 3.
lib.rs pub mod artifacts declaration moved from Task 2 to Task 1 because artifacts.rs tests are only compiled when the module is declared in lib.rs. Task 1 verification requires tests to pass.
